serverInfo.name: shadow-coach
serverInfo.description: Force-free, evidence-based reactive dog coaching backed by live dog profiles, walk logs, and longitudinal progress analytics. Powered by Calming Paws.
serverInfo.longDescription: Shadow is the AI coaching brain behind Calming Paws. In demo mode it answers breed-specific reactivity questions across 20 breed profiles and a three-type reactivity framework (fear / frustration / excitement). Authenticated users unlock a persistent dog profile, walk logging, trigger tracking, and personalised training protocol recommendations grounded in real walk data.

tools.name: lookup_breed
tools.description: Returns reactivity profile, common triggers, training nuances, and threshold notes for any of the 20 supported breeds. Available in demo mode — no auth required.

tools.name: get_dog_profile
tools.description: Retrieves the signed-in user's dog profile: breed, reactivity type, current threshold distance, active triggers, and training history summary.

tools.name: log_walk
tools.description: Logs a completed walk with date, duration, triggers encountered, reactions, and a freeform notes field. Feeds the progress analytics pipeline.

tools.name: get_progress
tools.description: Returns longitudinal progress data: threshold distance trend, reaction frequency over time, trigger stack history, and a cortisol-vacation flag if indicated.

tools.name: recommend_protocol
tools.description: Generates a personalised training protocol (DS/CC, LAT, Engage-Disengage, BAT 2.0, pattern games, or stationing) based on the dog's reactivity type, current walk data, and breed-specific nuances.
